# PowerTech Group of Chicago

> Chicago's premier UL Listed commercial security and IT solutions provider. Serving the Chicagoland area since 1993. Burglar alarms, fire protection, security cameras, access control, managed IT, cybersecurity, and wireless networking.

## About

PowerTech Group of Chicago is a UL Listed, PACA Licensed commercial security and managed IT provider headquartered in Arlington Heights, IL. With 31+ years of experience and 1,800+ clients served, PowerTech is the trusted choice for businesses throughout the Chicago metropolitan area that need reliable security systems and IT infrastructure.

## Security Services

- **Burglar Alarm Systems**: 24/7 intrusion detection and monitoring for commercial properties. UL Listed monitoring center. Professional installation and ongoing support.
- **Fire Protection Systems**: Addressable fire alarm systems meeting NFPA standards. Design, installation, inspection, and monitoring. Code-compliant solutions for any commercial facility.
- **Security Cameras**: HD and AI-powered video surveillance with remote viewing capabilities. Indoor and outdoor camera systems. Cloud and on-premise recording options. Real-time alerts and analytics.
- **Access Control**: Credential, keypad, and biometric entry systems. Manage who enters your facility and when. Integration with existing security infrastructure. Audit trails and reporting.

## IT Services

- **Managed IT Support**: Proactive monitoring, helpdesk support, and IT infrastructure management. Keep your business running without an in-house IT team.
- **Wireless Networks**: Enterprise-grade Wi-Fi and structured cabling. Reliable connectivity for offices, warehouses, and retail spaces.
- **Cybersecurity**: Threat detection, endpoint protection, firewall management, and security awareness training. Protect your business from modern cyber threats.
- **PCI Compliance**: Assessment, remediation, and ongoing compliance management for businesses that handle payment card data.

## Why PowerTech

- UL Listed Provider (License #1624830-000)
- IL PACA Licensed (#127-001634)
- Licensed, Bonded, and Insured
- 1,800+ clients served
- 31+ years in business (since 1993)
- 5.0 star Google rating
- 24/7 emergency support
- Partners: Cisco, Kidde, Brivo, Avigilon, CrowdStrike, Microsoft, Verizon, Bosch
